title: Create Domain.Graph.Query + Domain.Graph.Analysis + Domain.Graph.Diff sub-modules
acceptance_criteria: src/Graphos/Domain/Graph/Query.hs created with: shortestPath, neighbors, degree, breadthFirstSearch, depthFirstSearch, subgraph
src/Graphos/Domain/Graph/Analysis.hs created with: articulationPoints, biconnectedComponents, godNodes, edgeBetweenness, dominators, components
src/Graphos/Domain/Graph/Diff.hs created with: graphDiff, LabeledGraph related functions
All explicit exports, type signatures, no IO
Domain.Graph re-exports all from Core, Query, Analysis, Diff + existing FGL
